---
title: "Git & GitHub Training Recordings"
---

Missed the training? Don't worry! We record most of our trainings and you can watch them below.

## Git & GitHub: Fundamentals

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Sep. 10^th^ 2025, Li Kui**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DzaddOJwVFZMoEXIT_oZOXrGL2XtczC8/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::

## Git & GitHub Resolving Merge Conflicts

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Dec. 10^th^ 2025, Li Kui**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Kf5SBzO7QwOmb0wbYc7dgFrcUaFEBzdB/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>
:::

## Git & GitHub: Advanced Features

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

_This workshop wasn't offered during this time range_

:::

## Project Management with GitHub

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Nov. 12^th^ 2025, Li Kui**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fAdA5Eu7pQLOphq1AaYX1oVjNsi9MvMP/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::
